title: Entitlement
description: A specific right or benefit granted to a passenger or rider, such as free travel, priority boarding, or a concessionary pass.

entitlementType.description: Type of entitlement (e.g. FREE_TRAVEL, CONCESSION, PRIORITY)

eligibilityRules.description: Rules defining who is eligible for this entitlement

issuingAuthority.description: The authority or operator that issued this entitlement

resource.description: The resource being accessed against this entitlement
